description: Every Municode feature, plus an offline local mirror, real full-text search, change tracking, and citation tooling no other Municode tool has.

novel_features.name: Full offline AI-referenceable clone
novel_features.description: Pull a municipality's entire code into a local store and an AI-ready Markdown/text tree in one command, so an agent can reference it offline with no further API calls.

novel_features.name: Clone-vs-live drift diff
novel_features.description: See which sections of a city's code changed in the live code since you cloned it: added, removed, or reworded.

novel_features.name: Cross-city topic comparison
novel_features.description: Lay one topic (e.g. short-term rentals) side by side across several cities, aligning each city's controlling section.

novel_features.name: Ordinance-history extraction
novel_features.description: Turn a section's '(Ord. No. ..., date)' history annotations into structured ordinance / section / date rows.

novel_features.name: Intra-code cross-reference graph
novel_features.description: List what a section cites and what cites it, building an inbound/outbound reference graph for a city's code.

novel_features.name: Defined-term lookup
novel_features.description: Return the one authoritative definition of a term from a code's Definitions sections, with its citation.

novel_features.name: Mirror freshness check
novel_features.description: List synced codes whose upstream codification is newer than your local copy, so you know which mirrors to re-sync.
